title: Copper HUD
description: This texture pack makes your HUD copper.
body:
## This texture pack makes your HUD copper.The oxidation level shows a decrease in satiety, health and armor
![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b166ad37bc621a2ad8a153009cd6a790d608bfc4.png)

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eac0ccec3dd59b1622147d113796bcb810e78dd.png)

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/383fa8c3260f174974c9b1e5a71bdb9fd96256ac.png)

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99b5d045305698b94a2348d320523327318e3853.png)

if there is a flaw in the version, write to folsstoll@gmail.com indicating the modification, version, and issue.
